setup: Player (pos: 0, speed: 100), Enemy (pos: 1, speed: 10), both HP: 100
expect: Tick 1: Player attacks Enemy for 20 damage. Enemy gauge becomes 10. Enemy HP: 80.
Tick 1: Player cannot act (stunned). Enemy gauge hits 100 and attacks Player. Player stun decrements to 0.
Tick 1: Player gauge 100, attacks Enemy, fails (range > 1). Enemy gauge 100, attacks Player, fails (range > 1). Both gauges reset to 0.
